case right
Hist : History
L R : List Formula
nlf : NegLoadFormula
bas : Sequent.basic (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
nrep : ¬rep Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
LY RY : List Formula
lr_nlf_Y : NegLoadFormula ⊕ NegLoadFormula
r : PdlRule (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) (LY, RY, some lr_nlf_Y)
next : Tableau ((L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: Hist) (LY, RY, some lr_nlf_Y)
e : PathIn next.flip
e_in :
  e ∈
    exitsOf ((R, L, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist)
      (match (LY, RY, some lr_nlf_Y) with
      | (L, R, O) => (R, L, Option.map Sum.swap O))
      next.flip
IH : ⋯ ▸ e.flip ∈ exitsOf ((L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: Hist) (LY, RY, some lr_nlf_Y) next
⊢ (⋯ ▸ e.flip).pdl = ⋯ ▸ e.pdl.flip
